name: @cobuild/review-gpt
description: Shared ChatGPT browser review launcher for Cobuild repos

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && node --check src/prepare-chatgpt-draft.js && node --check test/review-gpt.test.mjs && node --check test/release-notes.test.mjs && node --check test/changelog-tools.test.mjs && node --check test/sync-dependent-repos.test.mjs && bash -n src/review-gpt-config-compat.sh scripts/committer scripts/package-audit-context.sh scripts/release.sh scripts/repo-tools.config.sh scripts/sync-dependent-repos.sh scripts/update-changelog.sh scripts/extract-changelog-section.sh scripts/generate-release-notes.sh
scripts.release:check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && env -u npm_config_store_dir -u NPM_CONFIG_STORE_DIR npm pack --dry-run
